gpt-5-nano.description: Reasoning model with internal thought process; best for deep analysis
gpt-5-nano.notes: No custom temperature; max_completion_tokens includes internal reasoning. Monitor finish_reason for truncation.

gpt-4o-mini.description: Fast, cost-effective model; good for standard analysis
gpt-4o-mini.notes: Fastest option; suitable for high-volume processing.

gpt-4.1-nano.description: Advanced reasoning variant with better structured output
gpt-4.1-nano.notes: Alternative reasoning model; good balance of cost and quality.

cache_config.description: Persistent cache using Supabase table; SHA-256 key based on dream_text + reading_level

validation_rules.description: Input and output validation constraints for the analysis pipeline

retry_config.description: Exponential backoff strategy for transient errors

error_handling.description: Strategies for handling errors at each pipeline stage

monitoring.description: Recommended metrics and alert thresholds for production monitoring

analysis_cache.description: Persistent cache for analysis results (replaces in-memory LRU)

columns.cache_key: TEXT NOT NULL UNIQUE (SHA-256 of dream_text:reading_level)
columns.metadata: JSONB (optional: user_id for audit, dream length, etc.)

analysis_cache.cleanup: DELETE FROM analysis_cache WHERE expires_at < NOW() (run daily)

prompting_strategy.base_system_message: You are a biblical dream interpreter who provides concise, insightful analysis with scripture references.
prompting_strategy.reading_level_interpolation: Insert reading level-specific instructions from dreamlink-domain-knowledge skill based on user profile
prompting_strategy.domain_knowledge_integration: Reference dream symbol taxonomy and biblical themes from dreamlink-domain-knowledge when constructing prompts

dreamlink-domain-knowledge.usage: Provides reading level instructions, dream symbol taxonomy, and biblical theme mappings

dreamlink-image-gen.usage: Triggered after successful analysis storage to generate accompanying image
dreamlink-image-gen.async_pattern: Fire-and-forget; image appears after processing completes

1.0.changes: Initial release: Replaces in-memory LRU cache with Supabase-backed persistent cache; adds validation repair and error recovery
